summary: P8 platform center CRUD UI remains pass. A P8 rework fixed system entry permissions: the frontend now calls SYS-001 to load real system/tenant/member/effective permissions and treats SYS_MANAGE_ALL as a system-scoped management permission, so system configuration navigation can be visible after entering a system.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci reports 2 moderate audit items. No npm audit fix --force was applied because it may force dependency upgrades; schedule dependency governance after trial deployment.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.
